developers.name: Richard Meissner

developers.name: Stefan George

narrativeAtSnapshot: Gnosis Safe is the dominant multi-signature wallet infrastructure for Ethereum, securing $1.2B in assets across 8,500 daily active users — adoption growing 40% month-over-month as institutional DeFi treasury management professionalizes. Nearly every major protocol treasury uses it for fund management. Lukas Schor, Richard Meissner, and Stefan George bring elite credentials: 6+ years in Ethereum core development, multiple completed G0 Group and Dapp.org audits, zero exploits across production deployments. Developer integrations: 23 new protocol integrations added in the most recent month alone. The team has signaled interest in decentralizing governance — community discussions reference potential tokenization of protocol coordination, though no formal announcement has been made. The fundamental question for investors is timing and mechanism: the protocol generates no direct fees to distribute, and any governance token would need a clearly articulated value capture model. However, the underlying adoption metrics are exceptional and the brand equity is unmatched in the multi-sig category. The gap between usage reality and investable surface area creates a tension that resolves either with a tokenization event or leaves fundamental value stranded at the infrastructure layer.
